texto: If the feet of enlightenment moved, the great ocean would overflow; If that head bowed, it would look down upon the heavens.Such a body has no place to rest. . . .Let another continue this poem.
explicacao: Citação de Paul Reps sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “If the feet of enlightenment moved, the great ocean would overflow; If that head bowed, it would …” articula reflexao, zen, would em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
